name: Chunky Gazpacho
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 46 ounces of tomato juice with pressed garlic, heaping teaspoon of sugar, heaping tablespoon of salt, seasoned salt, one tablespoon of olive oil, three tablespoons of lemon juice, one and a half teaspoons of Worcestershire sauce, half teaspoon of liquid hot sauce.
2. Stir in diced cucumber, green pepper, two carrots, three celery stalks, three green onions, and diced tomatoes until oil and seasonings are dissolved.
3. Pour the mixture into a large refrigerator pitcher.
4. Chill overnight or for 4 hours.
5. Serve cold with seasoned croutons on top.
